title: Synthesis Error when the FIR filter Verilog file is altered

features.name: zero assignment overrides multiplication result
features.description: Code should include a multiplication result that is directly assigned to zero, overriding the computed product

features.name: input signal optimized away after zero assignment
features.description: Code should include an input signal that feeds into a computation whose result is later overridden by a direct zero assignment, causing the input to be incorrectly removed by synthesis optimization
